items.t: The home of the Grand Annual Sprintcar Classic
items.d: Gates open at 3pm, cars on track from 5pm across three nights of racing at Sungold Stadium, Warrnambool.

items.t: Reutzel wins the 2026 Grand Annual Sprintcar Classic
items.d: The Texan drove from 12th to beat McHugh and Hallett home before a sold-out Sunday crowd near 13,000.

items.t: Classic winner's share climbing to $75k, then $100k
items.d: An extended Flying Horse Bar & Brewery deal bumps the 2027 top prize to $75,000 and 2028 to a six-figure payday.
